designVersion.label: New look (old design available for a limited time)

designVersionUpgrade.title: A fresh new Alkemio is here
designVersionUpgrade.body:
We're rolling out a new design that's faster, clearer, and built for what's next. You're invited to switch now.

If you prefer the old look, it'll stay available from your avatar menu for a limited time - and if something is missing, please let support know so we can carry it over before the old design retires.
designVersionUpgrade.confirm: Take me to the new design

appVersion.message: A new version of the app is available.
appVersion.recurringMessage: Please close all Alkemio tabs and reload to update.

onlineStatus.offline: You are currently offline. Please save any pending work locally as unsaved data may be lost.

cookieConsent.consent: By clicking "Accept All Cookies", you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation and analyse site usage.
cookieConsent.settingsIntro: When visiting a website, information can be stored on your browser in the form of cookies. This information can be about you, your preferences and your device. Mostly, this information is used to make the website work as good as possible. Some websites use it for marketing purposes. As Alkemio does not allow any advertisement on its website, we only distinguish two types of cookies.
cookieConsent.technical: Technically necessary cookies: enable you to navigate and use the basis functions and to store preferences.
cookieConsent.analysis: Analysis cookies: enable us to determine how visitors interact with our services in order to improve user experience.
